core_mechanism: An associativity (WDVV) constraint: an overdetermined system of nonlinear PDEs requiring that a commutative product whose structure constants are all third partial derivatives of a single scalar potential function be associative (a potential-generated associative/Frobenius algebra)
brief_reason: The abstract's central object is the associativity (WDVV) equations, and it exhibits their solutions as the dispersionless (leading semiclassical) limit of the bilinear Hirota equations, so that third derivatives of a single generating free-energy/tau-function define an associative product.
